data.title: Cloud-Based Structure
data.description: Microsoft.com is built on a cloud architecture using Azure services to ensure high availability and scalability.

data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Implements microservices for modularity and independent deployment.

data.title: Global Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes global load balancing to distribute user traffic across server locations.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Employs a CDN to cache content close to users to improve site loading times.

data.title: Resilient Data Storage
data.description: Uses multiple data centers and redundant systems for data storage.
